T0091.title: Doxing
T0091.definition: The act of maliciously obtaining and publicly exposing an individual's private data. In a data breach context, threat actors perform this operation in anonymous group chats, illegally acquiring and disclosing sensitive personal information such as national ID numbers, home addresses, phone numbers, social media accounts, and financial records.
T0091.description: The act of maliciously obtaining and publicly exposing an individual's private data. In a data breach context, threat actors perform this operation in anonymous group chats, illegally acquiring and disclosing sensitive personal information such as national ID numbers, home addresses, phone numbers, social media accounts, and financial records.
